concerns.text: T017 ('Implement manual audit sample generator') only generates a random sample list. It does not implement the logic to perform the manual audit, estimate the accuracy of the keyword-based heuristics, or report the observed accuracy rate as mandated by FR-015 and SC-009. The deliverable falls short of the requirement, creating a semantic gap where the system cannot verify heuristic accuracy.

FR-015 requires the system to 'perform a manual audit... and report the observed accuracy rate'. T017 is scoped only to 'sample generator'. Without a subsequent task to execute the audit logic (or an expanded T017), the acceptance criterion for SC-009 (measuring accuracy against a manual audit) is unreachable. This is a silent relaxation of the requirement.
